title: UK Releases More Files About Mandelson, Ex-Diplomat With Ties to Epstein
summary_full: Peter Mandelson, who was fired over his links to Jeffrey Epstein, made the claim in a letter that was revealed in more than a thousand pages of documents released on Monday.
summary_public: Peter Mandelson, who was fired over his links to Jeffrey Epstein, made the claim in a letter that was revealed in more than a thousand pages of documents released on Monday.
